traps.name: Pit Trap
traps.effect: Falls 10 ft into a pit. DC 12 DEX to grab the edge.

traps.name: Spiked Pit Trap
traps.effect: 10 ft pit lined with iron spikes. DC 14 DEX or fall in.

traps.name: Tripwire Arrow Trap
traps.effect: Arrows fire from hidden wall slots. Attacks 1d4 targets in 10 ft.

traps.name: Swinging Log Trap
traps.effect: Heavy log swings across the corridor. DC 12 DEX or knocked prone.

traps.name: Pressure Plate Darts
traps.effect: DC 12 CON or poisoned for 1 hour.

traps.name: Scything Blade
traps.effect: Blade sweeps the floor at ankle height. DC 14 DEX or hit.

traps.name: Falling Net
traps.effect: DC 13 STR to escape; restrained until freed. Net has AC 10, HP 20.

traps.name: Collapsing Ceiling
traps.effect: DC 13 DEX for half; blocks the passage until cleared (8 hours).

traps.name: Fire Jets
traps.effect: Jets erupt from wall vents in a 15 ft line. DC 14 DEX half.

traps.name: Magic Glyph (Blast)
traps.effect: 20 ft radius burst centered on trigger rune. DC 16 DEX half.

traps.name: Acid Flask Droppers
traps.effect: Ceramic flasks drop from a hidden ceiling mount. DC 13 DEX half.

traps.name: Alarm Glyph
traps.effect: Alerts all creatures within 300 ft. Likely triggers a wandering monster check.

traps.name: Gravity Inversion
traps.effect: Room gravity reverses for 1 round. Creatures fall to ceiling (1d6), then back (1d6).

traps.name: Paralysis Gas Canister
traps.effect: DC 14 CON or paralyzed for 1 minute. Canister is visible with DC 15 Perception.

traps.name: Rolling Boulder
traps.effect: DC 14 DEX or knocked prone and buried under rubble (DC 20 Athletics to escape).

traps.name: Teleportation Sigil
traps.effect: Teleports the trigger creature to a random room in the dungeon.

traps.name: Web Shooter
traps.effect: DC 12 STR to escape; restrained and flammable. Burns for 2d4 fire if ignited.

traps.name: Spectral Hands Trap
traps.effect: Ghostly hands burst from the walls. DC 15 CON or lose 1 max HP until long rest.

traps.name: Sleep Gas Trap
traps.effect: DC 14 CON or fall unconscious for 1 hour. Woken by damage or a loud noise.

traps.name: Lightning Rod Floor
traps.effect: Metal floor tiles complete a circuit when stepped on. DC 15 DEX half.

traps.name: Polymorph Trap
traps.effect: DC 17 WIS or polymorph into a random beast (CR 1 or lower) for 1 hour.

traps.name: Cursed Mirror
traps.effect: Creature that looks at mirror: DC 14 WIS or be Frightened of their own reflection for 1 minute.

traps.name: Pendulum Axe
traps.effect: Giant axe swings from the ceiling. +8 to hit; DC 13 DEX or take damage.

traps.name: Flooding Room
traps.effect: Doors seal and water fills the room. 1 foot per round; room fills in 10 rounds.
